changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE static_ua ( ua_name TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, ua_group TEXT NOT NULL, ua_label TEXT NOT NULL, pattern TEXT, sort_order INTEGER )

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label) VALUES ('Unknown', 'Browsers', 'Unknown'), ('Chrome / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / iPhone'), ('Chrome / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / iPad'), ('Chrome / Android', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Android'), ('Chrome / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Windows'), ('Chrome / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / macOS'), ('Chrome / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Linux'), ('Chrome / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Chrome / Unknown OS'), ('Firefox / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / iPhone'), ('Firefox / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / iPad'), ('Firefox / Android', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Android'), ('Firefox / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Windows'), ('Firefox / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / macOS'), ('Firefox / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Linux'), ('Firefox / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Firefox / Unknown OS'), ('Safari / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Safari / iPhone'), ('Safari / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Safari / iPad'), ('Safari / Android', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Android'), ('Safari / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Windows'), ('Safari / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Safari / macOS'), ('Safari / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Linux'), ('Safari / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Safari / Unknown OS'), ('Edge / iPhone', 'Browsers', 'Edge / iPhone'), ('Edge / iPad', 'Browsers', 'Edge / iPad'), ('Edge / Android', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Android'), ('Edge / Windows', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Windows'), ('Edge / macOS', 'Browsers', 'Edge / macOS'), ('Edge / Linux', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Linux'), ('Edge / Unknown OS', 'Browsers', 'Edge / Unknown OS')

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_ua (ua_name, ua_group, ua_label, pattern, sort_order) VALUES -- AI crawlers ('ClaudeBot', 'AI Bots', 'ClaudeBot', 'ClaudeBot', 1), ('Claude-SearchBot', 'AI Bots', 'Claude-SearchBot', 'Claude-SearchBot', 2), ('OAI-SearchBot', 'AI Bots', 'OAI-SearchBot', 'OAI-SearchBot', 3), ('PerplexityBot', 'AI Bots', 'PerplexityBot', 'PerplexityBot', 4), -- SEO crawlers ('AhrefsBot', 'Other Bots', 'AhrefsBot', 'AhrefsBot', 5), ('SemrushBot', 'Other Bots', 'SemrushBot', 'SemrushBot', 6), ('SERankingBot', 'Other Bots', 'SERankingBot', 'SERankingBacklinksBot', 7), ('Barkrowler', 'Other Bots', 'Barkrowler', 'Barkrowler', 8), ('DotBot', 'Other Bots', 'DotBot', 'DotBot', 9), ('MJ12bot', 'Other Bots', 'MJ12bot', 'MJ12bot', 10), ('HeadlineBot', 'Other Bots', 'HeadlineBot', 'ev-crawler', 11), ('PetalBot', 'Other Bots', 'PetalBot', 'PetalBot', 12), ('CocCocBot', 'Other Bots', 'CocCocBot', 'coccocbot', 13), ('SeznamBot', 'Other Bots', 'SeznamBot', 'SeznamBot', 14), -- Search bots ('Googlebot', 'Search Bots', 'Googlebot', 'Googlebot', 15), ('Google ImageProxy', 'Search Bots', 'Google ImageProxy', 'GoogleImageProxy', 16), ('Google FeedFetcher', 'Search Bots', 'Google FeedFetcher', 'FeedFetcher-Google', 17), ('Bingbot', 'Search Bots', 'Bingbot', 'bingbot', 18), ('YandexBot', 'Search Bots', 'YandexBot', 'YandexBot', 19), ('Baiduspider', 'Search Bots', 'Baiduspider', 'Baiduspider', 20), ('DuckDuckBot', 'Search Bots', 'DuckDuckBot', 'DuckDuckBot', 21), ('Qwantbot', 'Search Bots', 'Qwantbot', 'Qwantbot', 22), -- Security scanners ('WellKnownBot', 'Other Bots', 'WellKnownBot', 'WellKnownBot', 23), ('Censys Scanner', 'Other Bots', 'Censys Scanner', 'CensysInspect', 24), ('Palo Alto Scanner', 'Other Bots', 'Palo Alto Scanner', 'Palo Alto Networks', 25), ('VisionHeight Scanner', 'Other Bots', 'VisionHeight Scanner', 'visionheight.com/scan', 26), ('2ip Scanner', 'Other Bots', '2ip Scanner', '2ip bot', 27), -- Feed readers ('Feedly', 'Feed Readers', 'Feedly', 'Feedly', 28), ('Feedbin', 'Feed Readers', 'Feedbin', 'Feedbin', 29), ('Reeder', 'Feed Readers', 'Reeder', 'Reeder/', 30), ('FreshRSS', 'Feed Readers', 'FreshRSS', 'FreshRSS', 31), ('NewsBlur', 'Feed Readers', 'NewsBlur', 'NewsBlur', 32), ('rss-parser', 'Feed Readers', 'rss-parser', 'rss-parser', 33), ('sfFeedReader', 'Feed Readers', 'sfFeedReader', 'sfFeedReader', 34), ('Feeder', 'Feed Readers', 'Feeder', 'feeder.co', 35), ('Flus', 'Feed Readers', 'Flus', 'flus/', 36), ('WP.com FeedBot', 'Feed Readers', 'WP.com FeedBot', 'wp.com feedbot', 37), -- Fediverse ('Fediverse', 'Fediverse', 'Fediverse', 'Mastodon', 38), ('Misskey', 'Fediverse', 'Misskey', 'Misskey/', 39), ('SummalyBot', 'Other Bots', 'SummalyBot', 'SummalyBot', 40), ('Yumechi Proxy', 'Other Bots', 'Yumechi Proxy', 'Yumechi', 41), -- Social ('Facebook', 'Other', 'Facebook', 'facebookexternalhit', 42), -- Apps ('Obsidian', 'Apps', 'Obsidian', 'obsidian/', 43), ('Google Search App', 'Apps', 'Google Search App', 'GSA/', 44), ('okhttp', 'Apps', 'okhttp', 'okhttp/', 45), ('Go HTTP client', 'Apps', 'Go HTTP client', 'Go-http-client/', 46), -- Headless/suspicious ('HeadlessChrome', 'Other Bots', 'HeadlessChrome', 'HeadlessChrome', 47), -- More feed readers ('Inoreader', 'Feed Readers', 'Inoreader', 'Inoreader', 48), ('KrISS feed', 'Feed Readers', 'KrISS feed', 'KrISS feed', 49), ('newsboat', 'Feed Readers', 'newsboat', 'newsboat/', 50), ('RSS Guard', 'Feed Readers', 'RSS Guard', 'rssguard', 51), ('Gofeed', 'Feed Readers', 'Gofeed', 'Gofeed/', 52), -- More search/AI bots ('Amazonbot', 'Search Bots', 'Amazonbot', 'Amazonbot', 53), ('GPTBot', 'AI Bots', 'GPTBot', 'GPTBot', 54), ('ChatGPT-User', 'AI Bots', 'ChatGPT-User', 'ChatGPT-User', 55), ('Bytespider', 'Other Bots', 'Bytespider', 'Bytespider', 56), ('meta-webindexer', 'Other Bots', 'meta-webindexer', 'meta-webindexer', 57), ('meta-externalagent', 'Other Bots', 'meta-externalagent', 'meta-externalagent', 58), ('Applebot', 'Search Bots', 'Applebot', 'Applebot', 59), -- More Fediverse + misc (duplicate sort_order values preserved as originally seeded) ('Iceshrimp', 'Fediverse', 'Iceshrimp', 'Iceshrimp/', 60), ('Seamus', 'Search Bots', 'Seamus', 'Seamus', 60), ('xAI-SearchBot', 'AI Bots', 'xAI-SearchBot', 'xAI-SearchBot', 61), ('SeekportBot', 'Search Bots', 'SeekportBot', 'SeekportBot', 61), ('MistralBot', 'Search Bots', 'MistralBot', 'MistralBot', 62), ('Perplexity-User', 'AI Bots', 'Perplexity-User', 'Perplexity-User', 63), ('DeepSeekBot', 'AI Bots', 'DeepSeekBot', 'DeepSeekBot', 64), ('YouBot', 'AI Bots', 'YouBot', 'YouBot', 65), ('GoogleOther', 'Search Bots', 'GoogleOther', 'GoogleOther', 66), ('Pleroma', 'Fediverse', 'Pleroma', 'Pleroma', 67), ('Akkoma', 'Fediverse', 'Akkoma', 'Akkoma', 68), ('Friendica', 'Fediverse', 'Friendica', 'Friendica/', 69), ('OWLer', 'Search Bots', 'OWLer', 'OWLer', 70), ('Catodon', 'Fediverse', 'Catodon', 'Catodon', 70), ('StefansTools', 'Fediverse', 'StefansTools', 'StefansTools/', 71)

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE static_referer ( label TEXT NOT NULL, domain TEXT, domain_starts_with TEXT, domain_ends_with TEXT )

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO static_referer (label, domain, domain_starts_with, domain_ends_with) VALUES ('Google', NULL, 'google.', NULL), ('Facebook', 'facebook.com', NULL, NULL), ('Babelio', 'babelio.com', NULL, NULL), ('Qwant', 'qwant.com', NULL, NULL), ('DuckDuckGo', 'duckduckgo.com', NULL, NULL), ('Bing', 'bing.com', NULL, NULL), ('Yahoo', NULL, NULL, 'yahoo.com'), ('Brave', NULL, NULL, 'brave.com'), ('InoReader', 'inoreader.com', NULL, NULL), ('Ecosia', 'ecosia.org', NULL, NULL), ('Kagi', 'kagi.com', NULL, NULL), ('Yandex', NULL, 'yandex.', NULL)

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE noise_filter ( ua_name TEXT NOT NULL, uri_stem TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (ua_name, uri_stem) )

changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE robots_disallowed ( user_agent TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, refreshed_at TEXT NOT NULL )
